3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" id="frontpageinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebebccname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebebccname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebabfename' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebabfename" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

<svg class="shareoniconsvg shareoniconsvg-printlink" height="24" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><path d="M18
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Brøyting og strøing - Porsanger kommune

https://www.porsanger.kommune.no/broeyting-og-stroeing.544670.no.html
Avvik: 343 | Bestått: 389
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '206297' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el206297_0" name="206297" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="405278"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebbddbname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebbddbname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebabacname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebabacname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebeeebname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebeeebname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebecbename' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebecbename" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="logo cell small-8" href="https://www.porsanger.kommune.no/?cat=527770" id="logolinkmobile"> <img alt="Porsanger kommune logo" class="rs_skip logoimg" id="logomobile" src="https://img5.custom
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Close menu" class="rs_skip close-button" data-close="" type="button"> <span aria-hidden="true">×</span> <span class="show-for-sr">Meny</span> </button>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Planportal - Porsanger kommune

https://www.porsanger.kommune.no/planportal.407105.no.html
Avvik: 8 | Bestått: 91
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a class="colorscheme acctool inverted" href="#" onclick="setFeatureCookie('color', 'inverted')" title="Invertert fargeskjema"><img alt="Kontrastverktøy" class="layout" height="18" src="https://img5.c
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a class="colorscheme acctool normal" href="#" onclick="setFeatureCookie('color', '0')" title="Normalt fargeskjema"><img alt="Kontrastverktøy" class="layout" height="18" src="https://img5.custompublis
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" onblur="if (this.value == '') {this.value = 'Søk i hele nettstedet';}" onfocus="if (this.value == 'Søk i hele nettstedet') {this.value = '';}" type="text" value=
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="hassubitems" onclick="toggleSub(this); return false;">Kommunen sine planer og forskrifter<br/><span>Oversikt over vedtatte planer i Porsanger kommune</span></a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'dynimage4' appears 2 times

id="dynimage4"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'dynimage0' appears 2 times

id="dynimage0"
Each ID must be unique on the page

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '206297' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el206297_0" name="206297" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="405278"/>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebbdcfname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebbdcfname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/adresse-og-bolignummer.544414.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebeeffname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebeeffname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebdefdname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebdefdname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebbfdfname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebbfdfname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Avvik: 414 | Bestått: 407
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="shareoniconsvg shareoniconsvg-facebook" height="24" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><path d="M17,
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/kontakt.527778.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!-- <img src="/i

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebdcbbname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebdcbbname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
